## Epic 3 — Skills & Talents (#36)

**Dependency:** #34, #24 (dice types)
**Est. Effort:** Large

### Goal
Write chapter 09 — Talents & Abilities as a complete reference chapter.

### Chapter Structure
1. **Talents vs. Abilities** — The difference explained
2. **Purchasing Talents/Abilities** — 1/2/4 DP for N/A/M
3. **Dice Prerequisites** — How dice types gate access
4. **General Talents** — Available to all classes (10-15 talents)
5. **Class Talents** — 2-3 per class (16-24 talents)
6. **Combat Abilities** — Martial maneuvers
7. **Ability Chains** — How Novice→Adept→Master chains work (leads into magic)
8. **Creating Custom Talents** — DA guidelines
9. **Talent Reference Tables** — Quick lookup by category, dice requirement, DP cost

### Success Criteria
- Complete general talent catalog (10-15)
- Class talent catalog (16-24)
- Clear dice prerequisite rules
- Cross-reference to spell chapters (ch11, ch12)
- Builds without AsciiDoc errors

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and write general talent catalog
- [ ] Design and write class talent catalog
- [ ] Create talent reference tables (sortable by category/cost/dice)
- [ ] Write ability chain explanation (segue to magic)
- [ ] Build and fix errors
- [ ] Cross-reference to: dice types (ch08), magic system (ch10), classes (ch05)
